Duplicate Emails

https://leetcode.com/problems/duplicate-emails/description/

Solved on 2026-06-22.

Given a table `Person` with the following columns:

- `id`: the ID of the person
- `email`: the email of the person

Write a solution to report all the duplicate emails. Note that it's guaranteed that the email field is not NULL.

Return the result table in any order.

The result format is in the following example.

## Solution

```{sql}
    SELECT DISTINCT
        p1.email
    FROM
        Person as p1
    INNER JOIN 
        Person as p2 ON p1.email = p2.email
        AND p1.id > p2.id
    WHERE
        p1.email IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY
        p1.email;
```

## Explanation

We want to use self-join to find the duplicate emails. We join the `Person` table with itself on the same `email` column value, with different `id` so as to avoid self-join between the same row. We also filter for NULL emails, which are not duplicates. We then return the distinct `email` values, ordered by `email` (unnecessary, but nice to have).
